title: Abnormals Gallery Compat
description: A Resource Pack designed to add Compatibility to 3 Large Painting mods for Abnormals: Gallery, best use for Mod Packs (1.20.1)
body:
Gallery is a mod by Team Abnormals that enhances vanilla paintings aswell as add cutesy little icons for all paitning varients. What this resource pack does is add more icons for paitnings from 3 mods:
Medieval Paintings
TooManyPaintings
& Macaw's Paintings.

If you're looking for Portfolio or Dark Paintings Compat, look here: [Gallery Portfolio Compat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gallery-portfolio-compat/gallery)
